referenced_section_hint: Securitisation — operational requirements for regulatory capital relief
description: APS 220 does not apply to exposures securitised or transferred into securitisation vehicles that meet APRA's operational requirements for regulatory capital relief under APS 120.
Terms defined in APS 001 appear in bold on first use in APS 220.

referenced_section_hint: Risk Management — overall risk appetite statement and risk management strategy
description: A stand-alone credit risk appetite statement or credit risk management strategy is not required where these form part of the ADI's overall risk appetite statement or risk management strategy under CPS 220.
ADIs outsourcing aspects of credit risk management must have regard to CPS 231 for outsourced functions.
For large exposures, ADIs must also have regard to APS 221.
For associations with related entities, ADIs must also have regard to APS 222.

referenced_section_hint: Governance — senior officer outside Australia for foreign ADIs
description: Board requirements for foreign ADIs must be read subject to CPS 510, which requires a foreign ADI to nominate a senior officer outside Australia with delegated authority.
Internal risk appetite limit requirements are in addition to requirements in CPS 220.
Internal risk appetite limit requirements are in addition to requirements in APS 221.
Internal risk appetite limit requirements are in addition to requirements in APS 222.
Paragraph 46 refers to Attachment A for detailed requirements on collateral valuation policies and processes.

referenced_section_hint: Capital Adequacy: Counterparty Credit Risk — standardised approach or adjusted current exposure method
description: For derivative transaction exposures classified as non-performing, ADIs must calculate exposures under the standardised approach or adjusted current exposure method prescribed in APS 180.
Paragraph 108 refers to Attachment B for the prescribed provisioning approach that APRA may permit or require an ADI to implement.

referenced_section_hint: eligible lenders mortgage insurer definition and eligible collateral provisions
description: Attachment B references APS 112 for the definition of eligible lenders mortgage insurer and for the eligible collateral provisions relevant to cash on deposit deductions in prescribed provisioning.
